code:
value Account
  balance: Int
end

type TxError =
  | Overdraft

fn deposit(_ a: Account, _ amount: Int) -> Result<Account, TxError>
  Ok(a.copy(balance: a.balance + amount))
end

fn withdraw(_ a: Account, _ amount: Int) -> Result<Account, TxError>
  if amount > a.balance
    Err(TxError.Overdraft)
  else
    Ok(a.copy(balance: a.balance - amount))
  end
end

fn main() -> Unit
  let a0 = Account(balance: 100)

  mut current = a0
  mut last_ok = true

  match deposit(current, 50)
  when Ok(n)
    current = n
    last_ok = true
  when Err(_)
    last_ok = false
  end

  match withdraw(current, 30)
  when Ok(n)
    current = n
    last_ok = true
  when Err(_)
    last_ok = false
  end

  match withdraw(current, 500)
  when Ok(n)
    current = n
    last_ok = true
  when Err(_)
    last_ok = false
  end

  println("final_balance=#{current.balance}")
  if last_ok
    println("last_status=ok")
  else
    println("last_status=overdraft")
  end
end
